invariants: All counterexamples are positive two-atom Stieltjes moment sequences.
The gate is not evidence against the finite zeta prefix.
The upper raw wall remains zeta-specific and open all-k.
The adaptive corridor occupancy remains zeta-specific and open all-k.
Endpoint PF, RH, Laguerre-Polya membership, and Lambda <= 0 are forbidden as inputs.

matrix_rows.claim: Every measure delta_1+w*delta_a with w>0 and a>0 gives a positive Stieltjes moment sequence M_k=1+w*a^k, so raw moment log-convexity holds but stronger raw-wall/corridor claims may fail.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact countermodel family only; not a statement about the zeta heat-flow density.

matrix_rows.claim: A positive two-atom moment sequence can violate the upper raw wall R_k<=(2*k+1)/(2*k-1), hence can make x_k>1 and s_k<0.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Blocks generic Stieltjes/raw-log-convexity proofs of the upper raw wall; not evidence against the zeta prefix.

matrix_rows.claim: Even when the raw upper wall holds at k=1 and k=2, the scaled-upper side of the adaptive corridor can fail.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Blocks replacing scaled k-monotonicity by raw upper-wall checks alone.

matrix_rows.claim: Even when the raw upper wall holds at k=1 and k=2, the monotone-bridge lower side of the adaptive corridor can fail.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Blocks replacing the monotone bridge by raw upper-wall checks alone.

matrix_rows.claim: The adaptive corridor width is positive exactly under the open upper raw wall.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Exact algebra only; positivity of the width for actual zeta coefficients remains an all-k requirement.

matrix_rows.claim: The actual k200 negative-lambda zeta prefix satisfies 597/597 raw-cone rows and 594/594 adaptive corridor rows, showing the finite zeta data are special relative to the generic two-atom obstructions.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Finite zeta contrast only; not an all-k raw-wall or corridor theorem.

matrix_rows.claim: A promoted proof must use zeta-specific structure to prove the upper raw wall and corridor occupancy; generic Stieltjes positivity, raw log-convexity, and finite prefix evidence are insufficient.
matrix_rows.proof_boundary: Proof-safety gate only; not a mathematical proof of the zeta-specific theorem.

proof_boundary: Exact countermodel gate only. It blocks generic Stieltjes/raw-log-convexity promotions into the adaptive raw-moment wall or corridor, but it is not a claim about actual zeta coefficients, not an all-k theorem, not cone entry, not jwpf_06, and not Lambda <= 0.

summary.main_finding: Generic positive Stieltjes/raw-moment structure does not prove the adaptive raw wall or corridor. Exact two-atom measures can violate the upper raw wall, the scaled-upper corridor side, or the monotone-bridge lower corridor side, even while raw log-convexity holds. The actual zeta k200 prefix remains finite-compatible, so the missing proof must be zeta-specific and all-k.
